title: corchorus depressus
intro: Corchorus depressus, also known as the Indian spinach or jute mallow, is a plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help to soothe digestive issues and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. The health benefits of Corchorus depressus include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used in traditional medicine to address a range of health concerns.
